completed.summary: Fix mute button overlapping tribe text: muteBtn at (10,10) with depth 20 was created after tribeText (12,10), covering characters 'Xi' of 'Xin-xi'. Moved tribeText x to 38, past the ~24px mute button emoji area. All 481 tests pass.

Fix city menu scroll offset inversion: showCityMenu() used '+ scrollX' instead of '- scrollX', causing menu to render off-screen when camera moved (text has setScrollFactor(0)). Also added camera auto-center on starting city. 481 tests pass.

Update GDD.md §3.5 (Cloak Infiltration: ❌ Not in code → [x] Implemented, commit a5f8eaa) and §8.4 (AI low-HP prioritization: ⚠️ no prioritization → [x] Low-HP sort, commit 9564cad). Documentation-only. 481 tests pass.

Add Escape-key pause/resume overlay: semi-transparent 55% opacity backdrop dims canvas, centered 'PAUSED' text, 'Resume (ESC)' button. Pause blocked during AI turn (isAiRunning guard). togglePause() with idempotent pauseGame()/resumeGame(). 11 state-machine tests added. 492 total tests pass.

Sort tribe selection screen alphabetically: created sorted copy of TRIBE_CONFIGS using [...TRIBE_CONFIGS].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)) before rendering tribe cards. Original TRIBE_CONFIGS array is not mutated. All 492 tests pass.

Fix inverted pause guards in all 7 button handlers — handlers should be blocked when isPaused OR isAiRunning (not the opposite). After fix: all handlers use !this.isPaused && !this.isAiRunning guard. 492 tests pass.
Fix tech panel text overlap: filter tribe-specific series for non-matching tribes (10→7-8 columns), split into 2 rows when >5 series (≥120px per column). Dynamic panel height. 430 tests pass.
Add setScrollFactor(0) to city menu text objects so they stay attached to camera position when scrolling. 444 tests pass.
Add Grand Bazaar +400 score to calcScore() — tribe.cities.reduce((sum, c) => sum + (c.hasGrandBazaar ? 400 : 0), 0). 452 tests pass.
Correct level score formula per GDD §1.2: change c.level * 20 to (c.level - 1) * 50. Now L1=0, L2=50, L3=100, L4=150, L5=200. 452 tests pass.
Point Playwright testDir at tests-e2e/ to avoid vitest collision. Add testMatch: ['**/*.spec.ts']. 452 tests pass.
Split Phaser into separate vendor chunk via manualChunks. Build no longer emits large-chunk warning. Phaser in phaser-*.js (1.48MB), game code in index-*.js (85KB).
Add mute toggle button (🔇/🔊) to HUD. Persists preference in localStorage. Toggles game.sound.mute. 452 tests pass.
Move muteBtn to x=10 to stop overlap with end turn button at (660,10). No visual overlap. 452 tests pass.
Add ExecStartPre to kill stale processes on port 3001 before service start. Service binds correctly on restart. 452 tests pass.
Configure Phaser Scale Manager with mode: FIT and autoCenter: CENTER_BOTH. Game scales to fit viewport maintaining 4:3 aspect ratio. 452 tests pass.
Add Easy/Medium/Hard difficulty selection to tribe selection screen. Scales AI expansion rate, attack frequency, and tech priority. 452 tests pass.
Add Normal/Fast/Blitz speed selection with cost multipliers (1.0x, 0.75x, 0.5x). speedAdjustedCost() applies to all cost categories. 452 tests pass.
Add 24 unit tests for speedAdjustedCost and SPEED_MULTIPLIERS. Verifies Normal/Fast/Blitz rounding (Math.ceil, min 1⭐). 481 tests pass.

coach_review.notes: Player tick 2026-06-25T04:05 — Task Exhaustion Recovery. All 19 AGENTS.md tasks confirmed completed in git history. Checkpoint was stale (only 6 tasks recorded). Rebuilt checkpoint from git log. Live site HTTP 200, 492 tests pass, build clean. Generated 5 new tasks: E2E tests for pause/resume, tribe select sorting, sound toggle, and scoring extensions (territorial + exploration).
